calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Advanced From Mar-09-09 To Mar-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Grodan III in Propria Persona.

Mr. Gordon testified under oath and identified the signatures on the Will executed in 1964 and the Codicil executed in 1973 as being the signature of Verna U. Gordon. The Court being satisfied, granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The will was admitted.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.
